member.name: T:Prime.PinMonitorService.DataStructures.BaseLimits
member.summary: Base pin limits to be evaluated per measurement.
Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: target value that tolerances are based around.

member.name: P:Prime.PinMonitorService.DataStructures.BaseLimits.SetPoint
member.summary: Gets or sets setpoint.

member.name: P:Prime.PinMonitorService.DataStructures.BaseLimits.UpperTolerance
member.summary: Gets or sets upper tolerance.

member.name: P:Prime.PinMonitorService.DataStructures.BaseLimits.LowerTolerance
member.summary: Gets or sets lower tolerance.

member.name: P:Prime.PinMonitorService.DataStructures.BaseLimits.AverageUpperTolerance
member.summary: Gets or sets average upper tolerance.

member.name: P:Prime.PinMonitorService.DataStructures.BaseLimits.AverageLowerTolerance
member.summary: Gets or sets average lower tolerance.

member.name: T:Prime.PinMonitorService.DataStructures.Configuration
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class .

member.name: M:Prime.PinMonitorService.DataStructures.Configuration.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.PinMonitorService.DataStructures.Configuration.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Prime.PinMonitorService.DataStructures.Configuration.ExcludeList
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of excluded instance names.

member.name: P:Prime.PinMonitorService.DataStructures.Configuration.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the name for the configuration.

member.name: P:Prime.PinMonitorService.DataStructures.Configuration.MonitorState
member.summary: Gets monitoring state.

member.name: P:Prime.PinMonitorService.DataStructures.Configuration.Pins
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of Pin configurations.

member.name: P:Prime.PinMonitorService.DataStructures.Configuration.UniquePinNames
member.summary: Gets the unique pin names list.

member.name: M:Prime.PinMonitorService.DataStructures.Configuration.SetAllDataObjectsDumpLogger(Prime.PinMonitorService.DumpModes)
member.summary: Update logger for all data objects.
member.param: Global dump mode to set appropriate dump logger for each data pin.

member.name: M:Prime.PinMonitorService.DataStructures.Configuration.PrintStatsForAllPins(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Print per pin and type statistic data to ituff. In addition, a limit check is performed.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.returns: the output port based on measurement limit check.

member.summary: Data evaluation for all pins in config.
member.param: streaming data per pin per measure type.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: List of comment formatters with ituff data.

member.name: M:Prime.PinMonitorService.DataStructures.Configuration.UpdateState(Prime.PinMonitorService.DataStructures.MonitoringState.MonitorState)
member.summary: Update the monitoring state. In case where the state transition is invalid, a fatal exception will be thrown. Valid states transitions: INITIAL -> ACTIVE. ACTIVE -> ACTIVE / PAUSED / STOPPED. PAUSED -> ACTIVE/ PAUSED / STOPPED. RESUMED -> RESUMED / PAUSED / STOPPED. STOPPED -> ACTIVE / STOPPED.

member.name: M:Prime.PinMonitorService.DataStructures.Configuration.ResetConfig
member.summary: Reset all pins under config.

member.name: T:Prime.PinMonitorService.DataStructures.Configurations
member.summary: PinMonitor Configurations.

member.name: M:Prime.PinMonitorService.DataStructures.Configurations.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Prime.PinMonitorService.DataStructures.Configurations.PinMonitorConfigs
member.summary: Gets or sets pin monitor configurations.

member.name: M:Prime.PinMonitorService.DataStructures.Configurations.GetConfiguration(System.String)
member.summary: Get configuration by config name.
member.returns: if config name exists return the configuration object.
member.exception: throw exception if configuration not found.

member.name: F:Prime.PinMonitorService.DataStructures.Constants.IntegrityHighPort
member.summary: Exit port when integrity high limit is exceeded.

member.name: F:Prime.PinMonitorService.DataStructures.Constants.IntegrityLowPort
member.summary: Exit port when integrity low limit is exceeded.

member.name: F:Prime.PinMonitorService.DataStructures.Constants.MaxTooHighPort
member.summary: Exit port when thermal high limit is exceeded (TjRise exceeded UpperTolerance).

member.name: F:Prime.PinMonitorService.DataStructures.Constants.MinTooLowPort
member.summary: Exit port when thermal low limit is exceeded (TjDroop exceeded LowerTolerance).

member.name: F:Prime.PinMonitorService.DataStructures.Constants.SuccessPort
member.summary: Exit port when the execution is successful.

member.name: F:Prime.PinMonitorService.DataStructures.Constants.FailPort
member.summary: Exit port when there is a failure in the execution.

member.name: F:Prime.PinMonitorService.DataStructures.Constants.MaxValue
member.summary: Default maximum known value.

member.name: F:Prime.PinMonitorService.DataStructures.Constants.MinValue
member.summary: Default minimum known value.

member.name: T:Prime.PinMonitorService.DataStructures.Data
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. Gets or sets limit.

member.summary: Gets or sets the average of averages.

member.summary: Gets or sets the average of th minimum values.

member.summary: Gets or sets the average of the minimum values.

member.summary: Gets or sets the minimum value.

member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum value.

member.name: P:Prime.PinMonitorService.DataStructures.Data.StartOfTest
member.summary: Gets or sets the start of test value.

member.summary: Gets or sets the tjRise value.

member.summary: Gets or sets the tjDroop value.

member.name: P:Prime.PinMonitorService.DataStructures.Data.TotalStd
member.summary: Gets or sets std.

members.member:
calculate max, min, avg, sot, tjRise and tjDroop values.
/// list of source values.

member.summary: Gets type to data.

member.summary: Add data per pin name and type.

member.summary: Generate profiling data.

member.name: M:Prime.PinMonitorService.DataStructures.Pin.Evaluate(Prime.PinMonitorService.DataStructures.PinMeasurementType,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Double})
member.summary: Calculate max min and avg values for the data.

member.name: M:Prime.PinMonitorService.DataStructures.Pin.PrintProfileAndEvaluate(System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Double}},System.Boolean,System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IComntFormat})
member.summary: Print profile and evaluate.
member.param: flag indicating whether ignoring evaluation or not.

member.name: M:Prime.PinMonitorService.DataStructures.Pin.GenerateStatsAndCheckLimits(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.DatalogService.DatalogSpec.IMrsltFormat},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Generate statistic data per pin and for all measurement types specified by user. Limits check will be performed for all stats data.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.returns: the calculated output port based on the limit check.

member.summary: Reset pin stats data.

member.name: T:Prime.PinMonitorService.Internal.IPinMonitorService
member.summary: Service for monitoring Pin via SensorCollection API. That API used internally by AnchorService or by Kernel (Prime#).

member.name: M:Prime.PinMonitorService.Internal.IPinMonitorService.PostExecute(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Logic to be executed after each instance execution.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: T:Prime.PinMonitorService.DumpModes
member.summary: Global pin dump modes.

member.name: F:Prime.PinMonitorService.DumpModes.AverageInstance
member.summary: Average Instance

member.name: F:Prime.PinMonitorService.DumpModes.Full
member.summary: Prints the pin data after each instance in ituff and also stats at the "Stop" mode.

member.name: F:Prime.PinMonitorService.DumpModes.Stats
member.summary: Only prints statistics at the "Stop" mode.

member.name: T:Prime.PinMonitorService.IPinMonitorService
member.summary: Service for monitoring Pin via SensorCollection API.

member.name: M:Prime.PinMonitorService.IPinMonitorService.StartMonitor(System.String,Prime.PinMonitorService.DumpModes,System.Int32,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Starts the monitoring of the pins associated to the configName provided as input. Two configurations with the same name cannot be started at the same time.
member.param: Input configuration name corresponding to a configuration element in the json file.
Dump mode applicable to all pins.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.PinMonitorService.IPinMonitorService.StopMonitor(System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Stops the monitoring of the pins associated to the configName provided as input. Checks for existence in active configurations.
member.param: Input configuration name corresponding to a configuration element in the json file.
Ituff suffix tag to differentiate Stages of Stop Monitor.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: 1 or 0 respectively for Passing or Failing limits check.

member.name: M:Prime.PinMonitorService.IPinMonitorService.StopAllMonitor(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Stops the monitoring of the pins associated to all the active config names.
member.param: Ituff suffix tag to differentiate Stages of StopAll Monitor.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.PinMonitorService.IPinMonitorService.PauseMonitor(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Pauses the monitoring of the pins associated to the configName provided as input. Checks for existence in active configurations.
member.param: Input configuration name corresponding to a configuration element in the json file.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.PinMonitorService.IPinMonitorService.ResumeMonitor(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Resumes the monitoring of pins associated to the configName given as input. Checks for existence in paused configurations.
member.param: Input configuration name corresponding to a configuration element in the json file.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: true or false resulting in resuming the monitor config.

member.name: M:Prime.PinMonitorService.IPinMonitorService.IsConfigValid(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Checks if the config name provided as input is defined in the json file.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: T:Prime.PinMonitorService.PinMonitorService
member.summary: PinService implementation.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Value as a uservar.

member.summary: Interface which defines a value.

member.name: M:PinMonitorService.DataStructures.Parser.IValueDefinition.GetValue
member.summary: Returns underlying value of the variable.
member.returns: double value of the variable or raw value.

member.name: M:PinMonitorService.DataStructures.Parser.IValueDefinition.IsValid
member.summary: Validates the input data.
member.returns: Whether or not input data is valid.

member.summary: Value as a uservar.
